hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.java$'; then google-java-format -i "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && echo '{"additionalContext": "Java file auto-formatted with google-java-format"}'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); if [ "$(echo $INPUT | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false')" = 'true' ]; then exit 0; fi; if [ -f pom.xml ]; then COMPILE_OUT=$(mvn compile -q 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "Compilation failed: $COMPILE_OUT" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0
